lineage.Process: CopyMultiple "\\unosatdata02\GIS\UNOSAT_Templates\Geodatabase\EventCodeISODateISO3CountryCode.gdb\Flood_Data\Flood_Water FeatureClass" "\\unosatdata02\GIS\UA_Ukraine\GeoData\UNOSAT\Data_to_Process\FL20230606UKR\Ida\Geodata_Map11\Updated gdb\FL20230606UKR_SHP_17June2023_SWN_JKP_gdb\FL20230606UKR_SHP_17June2023_SWN_JKP.gdb\Flood_Data" Flood_Water "Flood_Water FeatureClass Flood_Water #"

Append 'Flood extent [17 June 2023, 09:13 UTC]' "\\unosatdata02\GIS\UA_Ukraine\GeoData\UNOSAT\Data_to_Process\FL20230606UKR\Ida\Geodata_Map11\Updated gdb\FL20230606UKR_SHP_17June2023_SWN_JKP_gdb\FL20230606UKR_SHP_17June2023_SWN_JKP.gdb\Flood_Data\WV3_20230617_FloodExtent_HolaPrystan" "Use the field map to reconcile field differences" "Water_Class "Water_Class" true true false 2 Short 0 0,First,#;Sensor_ID "Sensor_ID" true true false 4 Long 0 0,First,#;Sensor_Date "Sensor_Date" true true false 8 Date 0 0,First,#;Confidence_ID "Confidence_ID" true true false 2 Short 0 0,First,#;Field_Validation "Field_Validation" true true false 2 Short 0 0,First,#;Water_StatusID "Water_StatusID" true true false 4 Long 0 0,First,#;Notes "Notes" true true false 50 Text 0 0,First,#;Area_m2 "Area_m2" true true false 8 Double 0 0,First,#;Area_ha "Area_ha" true true false 8 Double 0 0,First,#;SenorID_old "SenorID_old" true true false 2 Short 0 0,First,#;StaffID "StaffID" true true false 4 Long 0 0,First,#;EventCode "EventCode" true true false 200 Text 0 0,First,#" # #

CalculateGeometryAttributes WV3_20230617_FloodExtent_HolaPrystan "Area_m2 AREA_GEODESIC" # "Square Meters" PROJCS["WGS_1984_UTM_Zone_36N",GEOGCS["GCS_WGS_1984",DATUM["D_WGS_1984",SPHEROID["WGS_1984",6378137.0,298.257223563]],PRIMEM["Greenwich",0.0],UNIT["Degree",0.0174532925199433]],PROJECTION["Transverse_Mercator"],PARAMETER["False_Easting",500000.0],PARAMETER["False_Northing",0.0],PARAMETER["Central_Meridian",33.0],PARAMETER["Scale_Factor",0.9996],PARAMETER["Latitude_Of_Origin",0.0],UNIT["Meter",1.0]] "Same as input"

CalculateGeometryAttributes WV3_20230617_FloodExtent_HolaPrystan "Area_ha AREA_GEODESIC" # Hectares PROJCS["WGS_1984_UTM_Zone_36N",GEOGCS["GCS_WGS_1984",DATUM["D_WGS_1984",SPHEROID["WGS_1984",6378137.0,298.257223563]],PRIMEM["Greenwich",0.0],UNIT["Degree",0.0174532925199433]],PROJECTION["Transverse_Mercator"],PARAMETER["False_Easting",500000.0],PARAMETER["False_Northing",0.0],PARAMETER["Central_Meridian",33.0],PARAMETER["Scale_Factor",0.9996],PARAMETER["Latitude_Of_Origin",0.0],UNIT["Meter",1.0]] "Same as input"

ExportFeatures WV3_20230617_FloodExtent_HolaPrystan "\\unosatdata02\GIS\UA_Ukraine\GeoData\UNOSAT\Data_to_Process\FL20230606UKR\Ida\Geodata_Map11\Updated gdb\FL20230606UKR_SHP_17June2023_SWN_JKP\FL20230606UKR_SHP_17June2023_SWN_JKP\WV3_20230617_FloodExtent_HolaPrystan.shp" # NOT_USE_ALIAS "Water_Class "Water_Class" true true false 2 Short 0 0,First,#,WV3_20230617_FloodExtent_HolaPrystan,Water_Class,-1,-1;Sensor_ID "Sensor_ID" true true false 4 Long 0 0,First,#,WV3_20230617_FloodExtent_HolaPrystan,Sensor_ID,-1,-1;Sensor_Date "Sensor_Date" true true false 8 Date 0 0,First,#,WV3_20230617_FloodExtent_HolaPrystan,Sensor_Date,-1,-1;Confidence_ID "Confidence_ID" true true false 2 Short 0 0,First,#,WV3_20230617_FloodExtent_HolaPrystan,Confidence_ID,-1,-1;Field_Validation "Field_Validation" true true false 2 Short 0 0,First,#,WV3_20230617_FloodExtent_HolaPrystan,Field_Validation,-1,-1;Water_StatusID "Water_StatusID" true true false 4 Long 0 0,First,#,WV3_20230617_FloodExtent_HolaPrystan,Water_StatusID,-1,-1;Notes "Notes" true true false 50 Text 0 0,First,#,WV3_20230617_FloodExtent_HolaPrystan,Notes,0,50;Area_m2 "Area_m2" true true false 8 Double 0 0,First,#,WV3_20230617_FloodExtent_HolaPrystan,Area_m2,-1,-1;Area_ha "Area_ha" true true false 8 Double 0 0,First,#,WV3_20230617_FloodExtent_HolaPrystan,Area_ha,-1,-1;SenorID_old "SenorID_old" true true false 2 Short 0 0,First,#,WV3_20230617_FloodExtent_HolaPrystan,SenorID_old,-1,-1;StaffID "StaffID" true true false 4 Long 0 0,First,#,WV3_20230617_FloodExtent_HolaPrystan,StaffID,-1,-1;EventCode "EventCode" true true false 200 Text 0 0,First,#,WV3_20230617_FloodExtent_HolaPrystan,EventCode,0,200;SHAPE_Length "SHAPE_Length" false true true 8 Double 0 0,First,#,WV3_20230617_FloodExtent_HolaPrystan,SHAPE_Length,-1,-1;SHAPE_Area "SHAPE_Area" false true true 8 Double 0 0,First,#,WV3_20230617_FloodExtent_HolaPrystan,SHAPE_Area,-1,-1" #
DeleteField WV3_20230617_FloodExtent_HolaPrystan Water_Clas;Sensor_ID;Sensor_Dat;Confidence;Field_Vali;Water_Stat;Notes;Area_m2;Area_ha;SenorID_ol;StaffID;EventCode "Delete Fields"
AddField WV3_20230617_FloodExtent_HolaPrystan Water_Clas TEXT # # # # NULLABLE NON_REQUIRED #
AddField WV3_20230617_FloodExtent_HolaPrystan Sensor_ID TEXT # # # # NULLABLE NON_REQUIRED #

AddField WV3_20230617_FloodExtent_HolaPrystan Notes TEXT # # # # NULLABLE NON_REQUIRED #

AddField WV3_20230617_FloodExtent_HolaPrystan Area_ha FLOAT # # # # NULLABLE NON_REQUIRED #
AddField WV3_20230617_FloodExtent_HolaPrystan SenorID_ol TEXT # # # # NULLABLE NON_REQUIRED #

AddField WV3_20230617_FloodExtent_HolaPrystan EventCode TEXT # # # # NULLABLE NON_REQUIRED #
CalculateField WV3_20230617_FloodExtent_HolaPrystan Water_Clas "Flood Water" "Python 3" # Text NO_ENFORCE_DOMAINS
CalculateField WV3_20230617_FloodExtent_HolaPrystan Sensor_ID "Worldview-3" "Python 3" # Text NO_ENFORCE_DOMAINS
CalculateField WV3_20230617_FloodExtent_HolaPrystan Sensor_Dat "06/21/2023" "Python 3" # Text NO_ENFORCE_DOMAINS
CalculateField WV3_20230617_FloodExtent_HolaPrystan Confidence "To be evaluated" "Python 3" # Text NO_ENFORCE_DOMAINS
CalculateField WV3_20230617_FloodExtent_HolaPrystan Field_Vali "Not yet field validated" "Python 3" # Text NO_ENFORCE_DOMAINS
CalculateField WV3_20230617_FloodExtent_HolaPrystan StaffID "JT" "Python 3" # Text NO_ENFORCE_DOMAINS
CalculateField WV3_20230617_FloodExtent_HolaPrystan EventCode "FL20230606UKR" "Python 3" # Text NO_ENFORCE_DOMAINS
CalculateField WV3_20230617_FloodExtent_HolaPrystan Area_m2 !shape.area@squaremeters! PYTHON # Text NO_ENFORCE_DOMAINS
CalculateField WV3_20230617_FloodExtent_HolaPrystan Area_ha !shape.area@hectares! PYTHON # Text NO_ENFORCE_DOMAINS
CalculateField WV3_20230617_FloodExtent_HolaPrystan Water_Stat "New Water / Water Increase" "Python 3" # Text NO_ENFORCE_DOMAINS

attr.attrdef: Area of feature in internal units squared.
